metadata.description: Autonomous software-engineering loop — board as the single source of truth, dynamic multi-agent workflows codified as reusable scripts, and a goal engine that won't stop before Done.

plugins.name: ultraloop
plugins.description: Two skills sharing one engine: ultraloop:pm (plan → write the board) and ultraloop:loop (read the board → dynamic workflows → TDD + pre-merge E2E → ship), plus the bundled gh-roadmap board authority. The trinity: board = WHAT (single source of truth), dynamic workflow = HOW (per-item orchestration, codified into a shipped workflows/ library with casting in code — coding sonnet·xhigh, reasoning inherits the main session), goal engine = WHEN (self-pacing /loop + stop-gating /goal behind fail-open guards). Roles and permissions fully separated.
